Reviews Contact

About Ochoa Co.

12+ years serving Nashville and surrounding areas

Ochoa Co. started with a simple goal: to provide honest, reliable general contractor services to our neighbors in Nashville. We saw a need for a contractor that prioritized communication, quality craftsmanship, and a deep understanding of the unique challenges and opportunities presented by Nashville's diverse housing stock.

Our approach is rooted in collaboration and transparency. We work closely with homeowners from the initial consultation to the final walkthrough, ensuring every detail aligns with their vision and budget. We value open communication, meticulous planning, and a commitment to exceeding expectations on every project.

We are proud to be a part of the Nashville community. We believe in giving back through volunteer work and supporting local initiatives. Our commitment extends beyond construction; we strive to build lasting relationships and contribute to the growth and prosperity of our city.

12+ Years in Business
800+ Projects Completed
97% Client Satisfaction
20+ Team Members
Ochoa Co.

Trusted general contractor professionals serving Nashville, TN and the surrounding areas. Quality work, honest pricing, guaranteed satisfaction.
